specFidelityNotes: Reviewed uncommitted working tree (no #412 commits yet) against issue #412, scope-alignment-issue-412.md, and component design docs. All five element families are implemented as typed packages/ui exports (Button, Badge/ConfidenceBadge, StatusChip/FilterChip/InputChip, ProgressBar/RealEstimatedProgressBar, HealthBar) with theme-token CSS, Vietnamese default copy, 44px touch targets, focus-visible rings, and prefers-reduced-motion handling. #397 DestinationCard/PrimaryNavigation exports preserved. Scope stays elements-only—no destination screen compositions.

smells.name: Duplicated Code
smells.description: clampPercent(value) is duplicated verbatim in both progress and health bar modules.

smells.name: Repeated Switches
smells.description: ConfidenceBadge maps confidence level to badge variant via nested ternary; a small lookup map (like CONFIDENCE_LABELS) would be clearer.

convention_notes: Matches #397 packages/ui pattern: typed React components, co-located styles.css token classes, public exports in index.ts and MODULE.md.
Vitest interaction-state coverage uses loadUiStyles() CSS contract checks consistent with existing ui package tests.
Review basis: git diff 35292a1..working-tree scoped to packages/ui, packages/theme/tokens.css, apps/demo import-boundary test; untracked component sources read in full.
